reviews.review_description: This is terrible... Requested a refund after playing it for 2 mins and was denied. The graphics are not smooth and there is little to no interactions you can do. Even a child would find this bland and boring. Don't recommend and not worth the money. Can't stress enough how bad this is.
I love all the puppies, the dogs are the loveliest human companions

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're glad that you like this game. Your support is what drives us forward. We will keep updating and create even better games.
